tasks.title: Write unit tests for auth functions
tasks.description: Create unit tests for all authentication functions: getCognitoToken(), loginToSSO(), cookie formatting, and all data factory functions.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests for getCognitoToken() (cache hit, cache miss, token expired)
Unit tests for authenticateWithCognito() (success, invalid credentials, invalid TOTP)
Unit tests for loginToSSO() (success, invalid JWT, invalid firm)
Unit tests for cookie formatting (expires handling, sameSite handling)
Unit tests for generateContactData() (unique names, overrides work)
Unit tests for generateFundData() (unique names, entity types)
Unit tests for generateMemberData() (wraps contact data correctly)
Unit tests for generateTFN() and generateABN() (correct format)
Unit tests for generateDateOfBirth() (age range validation)
All tests use mocking for axios calls
Tests located in tests/ or test/ directory
Tests run with npm test

tasks.title: Write integration tests for fixtures
tasks.description: Create integration tests for fund creation, member creation, and setupTest() with various configurations.
acceptanceCriteria: Integration test for full auth flow (Cognito → SSO → Playwright cookies)
Integration test for createFund() (creates SMSF, returns fundId)
Integration test for createMember() (3-step process, returns memberId and memberCode)
Integration test for setupTest() with requiresFund: true
Integration test for setupTest() with requiresMember: true
Integration test for setupTest() auto-detection from pageKey
Integration test for token caching (second call faster)
Integration test for SSO session caching
Tests use real SF360 UAT environment or mocked API
Tests clean up created resources if using real environment
Tests run with npm run test:integration or similar

tasks.title: Write E2E tests for MCP tools
tasks.description: Create end-to-end tests for all 4 MCP tools and the complete workflow from user request to passing test.
acceptanceCriteria: E2E test for sf360-test-plan tool (generates valid plan JSON)
E2E test for sf360-test-generate tool (generates valid test file from plan)
E2E test for sf360-test-evaluate tool (runs test, applies fixes)
E2E test for sf360-test-report tool (generates report markdown)
E2E test for full workflow (user spec → plan → test → evaluate → report)
Tests verify intermediate file artifacts exist
Tests verify test file runs successfully
Tests verify report contains expected sections
Tests can run against MCP server
Tests documented and automated

tasks.title: Update documentation
tasks.description: Update all user-facing documentation with API-based auth, setupTest() usage, and migration guide from UI-based to API-based auth.
acceptanceCriteria: README.md updated with API-based auth examples
README.md updated with setupTest() usage examples
README.md shows auto-detection from pageKey
INSTALLATION.md updated with Cognito/SSO configuration
INSTALLATION.md includes .env setup with all required variables
setupTest() API contract documented (parameters, return value)
Test data factory functions documented
Migration guide created (UI-based → API-based auth)
Migration guide includes breaking changes
Migration guide includes code examples
CHANGELOG.md updated with new features
All examples use correct import paths
